name: oh-my-project
description: Project-structure GOVERNANCE lane (a third axis — NOT a content domain, NOT a work-style). Route here whenever the work is about WHERE files belong and whether the folder tree obeys its rules, rather than producing the content of any file: classify/place a file under the right folder, detect & safely relocate rule-violating files, codify or update structure/naming rules, register datasets (checksum/split/lineage), generate & manage Docker environment assets (Dockerfile/compose into .omp/env/), bootstrap or audit a project's .omp/ SSOT. Since 0.4.0 omp also owns the SECRETARY axis (time): capture session events/todos/blockers/decisions into .omp/secretary/ (log), regenerate the pull-style BRIEF.md status briefing (brief), and run the weekly re-evaluation sweep (review) — 'record what happened / what's the project status / where did we leave off' requests route HERE. The axis is orthogonal to oms/omd: the SAME .pptx is omd when you author its content, omp when you ask whether it sits in the correct folder. CRITICAL: making a Dockerfile/compose IS a governance act, not plain code authoring — creating an environment asset means naming it, tagging it, deciding where it lives, and structuring it, so docker/Dockerfile/compose work routes HERE (omp-env), not to a work-style lane. Because governance is orthogonal, it is judged FIRST — before both the content domains (oms/omd) and the work-style lanes (omc/sp/omx) — so structure work is never missed and never falls through to handle-directly. The .omp/ index-coherence and safe-fileops guards (move = copy→verify→delete, propose-before-execute, keep STRUCTURE.md/rules.json/DATASETS.md in sync) and the omp-env generation gate (dry-run diff → human approval → write → disk verify, personal values resolved from .env never hardcoded) live only inside omp — so folder governance AND docker environment-asset work must not be handled directly or as a raw OMC parallel sweep. Heavy SUB-tasks inside omp (multi-source research, test-first tooling code) may still re-route to omc/sp.

skills.name: project-governance-lane
skills.description: Signals that route to oh-my-project (the session then picks the exact omp-* STAGE: init/codify/organize/dataset/env/doc/learn/audit/log/brief/review).
examples: is this file in the right folder? / 이 파일 제자리에 있어?
이 논문 작업물들이 vault/workspace 분류 기준에 맞아? 어긋난 거 정리해줘
detect rule-violating files and relocate them safely (organize)
register this dataset — checksum, split, lineage (dataset)
audit this folder against its rules — read-only PASS/FAIL (audit)
도커 환경 만들어줘 / Dockerfile·compose 생성해줘 (env — making an env asset is governance)
이 프로젝트 도커 이미지·컨테이너 이름 규칙대로 관리해줘 (env + codify naming)
이번 세션에서 한 일·결정·막힌 것 기록해줘 (log)
지금 이 프로젝트 어디까지 왔어? 브리핑 갱신해줘 (brief)
주간 리뷰 — 묵은 todo 재평가하고 blocker 다시 봐줘 (review)
